name: claude-ipc
description: Cross-process messaging between independently-launched Claude Code sessions

scripts.build:hooks: bun build src/hooks/userPromptSubmit.ts --compile --outfile dist/ipc-ups && bun build src/hooks/sessionStart.ts --compile --outfile dist/ipc-session-start && bun build src/hooks/stop.ts --compile --outfile dist/ipc-stop
scripts.build: bun run build:cli && bun run build:hooks
